title: More Nonsense Limerick 12
content:
There was an old man of Dunluce,
    Who went out to sea on a goose:
    When he'd gone out a mile, 
    He observ'd with a smile,
    "It is time to return to Dunluce."
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 12" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
